## Problem

What remote workflow is currently slow, fragile, or awkward?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the change you want to see.

## Mobile Context

- When this matters most:

## Success Signal

How would we know this change improved the product?

## Alternatives Considered

List any fallback or workaround you use today.

## Extra Context

Add examples, screenshots, or reference products if useful.
